<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Parse EPUB files to extract chapters and metadata.</span>

<span class="sd">    Supports both NAV HTML (EPUB3) and NCX (EPUB2) navigation formats.</span>
<span class="sd">    Handles nested chapter structures and accurately slices content between</span>
<span class="sd">    navigation points.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>

<span class="sd">            paragraph_separator: String to use between paragraphs (default: &quot;\\n\\n&quot;)</span>

<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">filepath</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">filepath</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Metadata</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_upper_titles_for_toc</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_upper_title_cache</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>

        <span class="n">titles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">meta</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>

        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>

<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Extract a list of metadata values from Dublin Core field.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;DC&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">items</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">items</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.get_metadata">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.get_metadata">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Metadata</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract metadata from EPUB.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Metadata object with title, authors, etc.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_metadata</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_metadata</span>

        <span class="c1"># Extract publication year with special date parsing</span>
        <span class="n">publication_year</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">date_str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;date&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">date_str</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">year_match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\b(19|20)\d</span><span class="si">{2}</span><span class="s2">\b&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">date_str</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">publication_year</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">year_match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">year_match</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">date_str</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_metadata</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Metadata</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">authors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_list_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;creator&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;description&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">publisher</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;publisher&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">publication_year</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">publication_year</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">identifier</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;language&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">contributors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_list_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;contributor&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">rights</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;rights&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">coverage</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_single_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;coverage&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_metadata</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.get_chapters">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.get_chapters">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">include_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract all chapters from the EPUB using navigation.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            include_text: If True, include full chapter text. If False, return only</span>
<span class="sd">                metadata (title, id, level, char_count). Default: True.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            List of Chapter objects</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># First, process the navigation structure</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_process_epub_content_nav</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_nav_processed</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_process_epub_content_nav</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="c1"># Convert the navigation structure to Chapter objects</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_build_chapters_from_nav</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">processed_nav_structure</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">level</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">include_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_text</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapters</span></div>


    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_chapters_from_nav</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">nav_structure</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]],</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">level</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Recursively build Chapter objects from navigation structure.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            nav_structure: List of navigation entries</span>
<span class="sd">            chapters: List to append Chapter objects to</span>
<span class="sd">            parent_id: ID of parent chapter (for nested chapters)</span>
<span class="sd">            level: Depth level in the chapter hierarchy</span>
<span class="sd">            include_text: If True, include full text; if False, only metadata</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_structure</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Untitled&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">children</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>

            <span class="c1"># Generate a unique ID for this chapter</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>

            <span class="c1"># Get the text content if available and requested</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">char_count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

            <span class="c1"># Create Chapter object</span>
            <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">char_count</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">level</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">level</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Process children recursively</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">children</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_build_chapters_from_nav</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">children</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">parent_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">level</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">level</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">include_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_process_epub_content_nav</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: C901</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Process EPUB content using ITEM_NAVIGATION (NAV HTML) or ITEM_NCX.</span>
<span class="sd">        Globally orders navigation entries and slices content between them.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_nav_processed</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span>
        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Processing EPUB using navigation document (NAV/NCX)...&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="c1"># 1. Check ITEM_NAVIGATION for NAV HTML</span>
        <span class="n">nav_items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ebooklib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ITEM_NAVIGATION</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Prefer files named &#39;nav.xhtml&#39; or similar</span>
            <span class="n">preferred_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">item</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.html&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">preferred_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">preferred_nav</span>
                <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found preferred NAV HTML: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Check if any ITEM_NAVIGATION is HTML</span>
                <span class="n">html_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">item</span>
                        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.html&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">html_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_nav</span>
                    <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found NAV HTML: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">html_nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 2. Check for NCX in ITEM_NAVIGATION</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ncx_in_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">next</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">item</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ncx_in_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_in_nav</span>
                <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ncx&quot;</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found NCX via ITEM_NAVIGATION: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ncx_in_nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 3. Check for NCX constant</span>
        <span class="n">ncx_constant</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ITEM_NCX&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">ncx_constant</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ncx_items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ncx_constant</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ncx_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_items</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
                <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ncx&quot;</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found NCX via ITEM_NCX: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 4. Fallback: search all documents for NAV HTML</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ebooklib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ITEM_DOCUMENT</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">html_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&lt;nav&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">html_content</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s1">&#39;epub:type=&quot;toc&quot;&#39;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">html_content</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">html_content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="n">nav_tag</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">attrs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub:type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;toc&quot;</span><span class="p">})</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_tag</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span>
                            <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span>
                            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found NAV HTML in: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                            <span class="k">break</span>
                <span class="k">except</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="ne">AttributeError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">UnicodeDecodeError</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># If no navigation found, raise error</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;No navigation document found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;No navigation document (NAV HTML or NCX) found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Parse navigation content</span>
        <span class="n">parser_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;xml&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Using parser: &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">parser_type</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">nav_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">nav_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parser_type</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">e</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">error</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Failed to parse navigation: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Failed to parse navigation content: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">e</span>

        <span class="c1"># Cache all document HTML and determine spine order</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">spine_docs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">spine_item_tuple</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">item_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spine_item_tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_item_with_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">())</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Spine item with id &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">item_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">doc_order</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)}</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="n">urllib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unquote</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>

        <span class="c1"># Load document content</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ebooklib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ITEM_DOCUMENT</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">nav_point</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;content&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;a&quot;</span><span class="p">])</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">html_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_content</span>
                <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">e</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">error</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Error decoding content for </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="c1"># Extract and order navigation entries</span>
        <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">processed_nav_structure</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Parse based on nav_type</span>
        <span class="n">parse_successful</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">nav_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;navMap&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_map</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Parsing NCX &lt;navMap&gt;...&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">nav_point</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;navPoint&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_parse_ncx_navpoint</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">processed_nav_structure</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">parse_successful</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Could not find &lt;navMap&gt; in NCX&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Parsing NAV HTML...&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">toc_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">attrs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub:type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;toc&quot;</span><span class="p">})</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">toc_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Fallback: look for any &lt;nav&gt; with &lt;ol&gt;</span>
                <span class="n">all_navs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">nav</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">all_navs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;ol&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                        <span class="n">toc_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav</span>
                        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found fallback TOC in &lt;nav&gt; with &lt;ol&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">break</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">toc_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">top_ol</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">toc_nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;ol&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">top_ol</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">li</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">top_ol</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;li&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">):</span>
                        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_parse_html_nav_li</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">li</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">processed_nav_structure</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">parse_successful</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found &lt;nav&gt; but no top-level &lt;ol&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Could not find TOC structure in NAV HTML&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">parse_successful</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;No valid navigation entries found&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;No valid navigation entries found after parsing&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Sort entries by document order and position</span>
        <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]))</span>
        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Sorted </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> navigation entries&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Slice content between TOC entries</span>
        <span class="n">num_entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">num_entries</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">current_entry</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">current_src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">current_doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">current_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">current_doc_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">num_entries</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="n">next_doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="n">next_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

            <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_slice_spine_html</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">next_pos</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">allow_wraparound</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Fallback: if empty, use whole file</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;No content for &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39;, using full file&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">slice_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slice_html</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="c1"># Add line breaks after paragraphs</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tag</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;p&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;div&quot;</span><span class="p">]):</span>
                    <span class="n">tag</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">paragraph_separator</span><span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="c1"># Handle ordered lists</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ol</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;ol&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">start_attr</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ol</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;start&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">start_num</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_attr</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start_attr</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">li_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">li</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ol</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;li&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)):</span>
                        <span class="n">number_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">start_num</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">+</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">li_idx</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">) &quot;</span>
                        <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">string</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">li_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">cast</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NavigableString</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">li_text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace_with</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">number_text</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">li_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                            <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                            <span class="n">li</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">insert</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">NavigableString</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">number_text</span><span class="p">))</span>

                <span class="c1"># Remove footnote tags</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tag</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;sup&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sub&quot;</span><span class="p">]):</span>
                    <span class="n">tag</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decompose</span><span class="p">()</span>

                <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clean_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(),</span>
                    <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">paragraph_separator</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">calculate_text_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

        <span class="c1"># Handle content before first TOC entry</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">first_entry</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_nav_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">first_doc_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">first_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">first_doc_order</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">prefix_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_doc_order</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">intermediate_doc_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">doc_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>
                    <span class="n">prefix_html</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">intermediate_doc_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">first_doc_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_doc_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">prefix_html</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">first_doc_html</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">first_pos</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">prefix_html</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">prefix_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix_html</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tag</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">prefix_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;sup&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sub&quot;</span><span class="p">]):</span>
                    <span class="n">tag</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decompose</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="n">prefix_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clean_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">())</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">prefix_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">prefix_chapter_src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;internal:prefix_content&quot;</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">prefix_chapter_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">prefix_text</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_lengths</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">prefix_chapter_src</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">prefix_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">processed_nav_structure</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">insert</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="p">{</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">prefix_chapter_src</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Introduction&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[],</span>
                        <span class="p">},</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Added prefix content chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Finished processing. Found </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> sections&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_nav_processed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_upper_title_cache</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>  <span class="c1"># invalidate if reprocessed for any reason</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_doc_key</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Find the best matching doc_key for a given base_href.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">os</span>

        <span class="n">candidates</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">urllib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unquote</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">base_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">os</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">basename</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">k</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">keys</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">keys</span><span class="p">()):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">os</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">basename</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">base_name</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">k</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_parse_ncx_navpoint</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">tree_structure_list</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse NCX navPoint recursively.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">nav_label</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;navLabel&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;content&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">nav_label</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_label</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">nav_label</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Untitled Section&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">content</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">attrs</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_doc_key</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Entry &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; points to &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not in spine&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_position_robust</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">entry_data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">}</span>
