                <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_data</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Entry &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; has no &#39;src&#39; attribute&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process children</span>
        <span class="n">child_navpoints</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_point</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;navPoint&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">child_navpoints</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">child_np</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">child_navpoints</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_parse_ncx_navpoint</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">child_np</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">tree_structure_list</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_parse_html_nav_li</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">tree_structure_list</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse HTML NAV &lt;li&gt; recursively.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">link</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;a&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">span_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;span&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Untitled Section&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[]}</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">link</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">attrs</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">t</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">contents</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">NavigableString</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">t</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">contents</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">NavigableString</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">t</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">contents</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">NavigableString</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">title</span>

        <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">title</span>
        <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span>

        <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_doc_key</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_position_robust</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">entry_data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">}</span>
                <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_data</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Entry &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; points to &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not in spine&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;has_content&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process children</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">child_ol</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">li_element</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;ol&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">child_li</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">child_ol</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;li&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_parse_html_nav_li</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">child_li</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">ordered_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;children&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">tree_structure_list</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_entry_node</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_position_robust</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Find the position of a fragment ID within a document.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            doc_href: Document href/filename</span>
<span class="sd">            fragment_id: Fragment ID to find (e.g., &#39;chapter1&#39;)</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Position (character index) in the HTML, or 0 if not found</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Document &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not found in cached content&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="n">html_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

        <span class="c1"># Try BeautifulSoup first</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">temp_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;div&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">html_content</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&lt;/div&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">target_element</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">temp_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">target_element</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">tag_str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_element</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tag_str</span><span class="p">[:</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tag_str</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">)])</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">debug</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found position for id=&#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39;: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pos</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">e</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;BeautifulSoup failed to find id=&#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39;: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">e</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Try regex pattern</span>
        <span class="n">safe_fragment_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">id_name_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;[^&gt;]+(?:id|name)</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">s*=</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">s*[</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;]</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">safe_fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">[</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">&#39;]&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">IGNORECASE</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">id_name_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">html_content</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">debug</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found position for id/name=&#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; (regex): </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pos</span>

        <span class="c1"># Try simple string search</span>
        <span class="n">id_match_str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;id=&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&quot;&#39;</span>
        <span class="n">name_match_str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;name=&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&quot;&#39;</span>
        <span class="n">id_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">id_match_str</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">name_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name_match_str</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">id_pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">name_pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">id_pos</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">name_pos</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">id_pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">id_pos</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">name_pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">name_pos</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">tag_start_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">html_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rfind</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">final_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tag_start_pos</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">tag_start_pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">debug</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found position for id/name=&#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39;: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">final_pos</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">final_pos</span>

        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Anchor &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">fragment_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39; not found in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_remove_duplicate_title_line</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Remove first line if it matches the chapter title.</span>

<span class="sd">        Handles various scenarios:</span>
<span class="sd">        1. Exact match: &quot;ONE\\nThe morning...&quot; -&gt; &quot;The morning...&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        2. Same-line match: &quot;ONE The morning...&quot; -&gt; &quot;The morning...&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        3. Case-insensitive matches</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Chapter text content</span>
<span class="sd">            title: Chapter title from navigation</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Text with duplicate title line removed (if found)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

        <span class="n">first_line</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">title_clean</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># No title to compare</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check various matching scenarios</span>

        <span class="c1"># 1. Exact match (entire first line is the title)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_line</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="c1"># 2. Case-insensitive match</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">join_remainder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">remainder</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">remainder</span>

        <span class="c1"># 3. First line starts with title followed by space (e.g., &quot;ONE The morning...&quot;)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_clean</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">join_remainder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 4. Case-insensitive version of #3</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">join_remainder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 5. Title followed by punctuation separators (e.g., &quot;ONE: The morning...&quot;)</span>
        <span class="n">separator_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">rf</span><span class="s2">&quot;^</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">[\s:\-\.,\u2013\u2014]+(.+)$&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">flags</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">IGNORECASE</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">separator_match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">separator_pattern</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">first_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">separator_match</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">separator_match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">join_remainder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># 6. Normalized matching for heading-like first lines</span>
        <span class="n">normalized_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[^a-z0-9]+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title_clean</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="n">normalized_first</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;[^a-z0-9]+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">normalized_title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">normalized_first</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">normalized_first</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">normalized_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

            <span class="n">is_heading_like</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">first_line</span>
            <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">120</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;!&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_heading_like</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">normalized_title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">normalized_first</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">normalized_title</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

                <span class="n">heading_prefixes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;part&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;book&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;section&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;act&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">heading_prefixes</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="c1"># No match - return original</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.extract_chapters">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.extract_chapters">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">deduplicate_chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">skip_toc</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract text from selected chapters.</span>

<span class="sd">        :param chapter_ids: List of chapter IDs to extract. If None, extract all.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param deduplicate_chapter_titles: If True, removes duplicate chapter titles</span>
<span class="sd">            that appear as the first line of chapter content. Default is True.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param skip_toc: If True, skip TOC and front matter chapters. Default is False.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param include_chapter_title: If True, includes chapter titles in the output.</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is False.</span>
<span class="sd">        :returns: Combined text from all selected chapters with chapter titles separated</span>
<span class="sd">            by 4 linebreaks before the title and 2 linebreaks after.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_ids</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Extract all chapters</span>
            <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapters</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Filter by chapter IDs</span>
            <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ch</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_ids</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Skip TOC/front matter if requested</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">skip_toc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Create temporary Page objects to use the same detection logic</span>
            <span class="n">filtered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">temp_page</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">page_number</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;temp&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">char_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_count</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">PageSource</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">SYNTHETIC</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_is_toc_or_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">temp_page</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">filtered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">filtered</span>

        <span class="c1"># Combine text with chapter titles</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Remove duplicate title if requested</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">deduplicate_chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">cleaned_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_remove_duplicate_title_line</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">cleaned_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>

                <span class="c1"># Format: 4 linebreaks (if not first), chapter title,</span>
                <span class="c1"># 2 linebreaks, content</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">include_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># First chapter: no leading linebreaks</span>
                    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">cleaned_text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">include_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Subsequent chapters: 4 linebreaks before title</span>
                    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n\n\n</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">cleaned_text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cleaned_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.get_pages">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.get_pages">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_pages</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">synthetic_page_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">2000</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">use_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract pages from the EPUB.</span>

<span class="sd">        First attempts to use EPUB page-list navigation (original print pages).</span>
<span class="sd">        If no page-list is found, generates synthetic pages based on content.</span>

<span class="sd">        :param synthetic_page_size: Size of synthetic pages in characters, or words</span>
<span class="sd">            if ``use_words`` is True. Default is 2000 characters or about 350 words.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param use_words: If True, ``synthetic_page_size`` is interpreted as word count.</span>
<span class="sd">        :returns: List of Page objects.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="c1"># Try to get pages from EPUB page-list first</span>
        <span class="n">pages</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_epub_page_list</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> pages from EPUB page-list&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pages</span>

        <span class="c1"># Fall back to synthetic page generation</span>
        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;No page-list found, generating synthetic pages&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_generate_synthetic_pages</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">synthetic_page_size</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_words</span><span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.has_page_list">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.has_page_list">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">has_page_list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Check if the EPUB contains a page-list navigation.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            True if page-list navigation exists, False otherwise</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_page_list_nav</span><span class="p">())</span></div>


    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_page_list_nav</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Find the page-list navigation element in the EPUB.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Tuple of (nav_soup, nav_type) or None if not found</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav_checked</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check ITEM_NAVIGATION for NAV HTML with page-list</span>
        <span class="n">nav_items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ebooklib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ITEM_NAVIGATION</span><span class="p">))</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.html&quot;</span><span class="p">)):</span>
                <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">nav_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_PAGE_LIST_ATTR_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_content</span><span class="p">):</span>
                        <span class="k">continue</span>
                    <span class="n">nav_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">attrs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub:type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;page-list&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found page-list in NAV HTML: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav_checked</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
                        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span>
                <span class="k">except</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="ne">AttributeError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">UnicodeDecodeError</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check for NCX pageList</span>
        <span class="n">ncx_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">nav_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">ncx_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_item</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">ncx_item</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ncx_constant</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ITEM_NCX&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ncx_constant</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">ncx_items</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ncx_constant</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ncx_items</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">ncx_item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_items</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ncx_item</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">ncx_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">ncx_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">DefusedET</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fromstring</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ncx_content</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">page_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.//{*}pageList&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page_list</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found pageList in NCX: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">ncx_item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_list</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav_checked</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span>
            <span class="k">except</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">DefusedET</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ParseError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">UnicodeDecodeError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">pass</span>

        <span class="c1"># Fallback: search all documents for embedded page-list</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">item</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_items_of_type</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ebooklib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ITEM_DOCUMENT</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">html_content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_content</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ignore&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_PAGE_LIST_ATTR_PATTERN</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">search</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">html_content</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>
                <span class="n">soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">html_content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;nav&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">attrs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub:type&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;page-list&quot;</span><span class="p">})</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found page-list in document: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav_checked</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span>
            <span class="k">except</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="ne">AttributeError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">UnicodeDecodeError</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_page_list_nav_checked</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_epub_page_list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract pages from EPUB page-list navigation.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            List of Page objects from the page-list, or empty list if not found</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">nav_result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_page_list_nav</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_result</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_result</span>
        <span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Ensure chapters are processed for chapter mapping</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_texts</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_process_epub_content_nav</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="c1"># Build document order for position finding</span>
        <span class="n">spine_docs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">spine_item_tuple</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">item_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spine_item_tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">item</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_item_with_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_name</span><span class="p">())</span>

        <span class="n">doc_order</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)}</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="n">urllib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unquote</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">):</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>

        <span class="c1"># Parse page entries</span>
        <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># EPUB3 NAV HTML format</span>
            <span class="n">ol</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;ol&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ol</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">li</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ol</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;li&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">link</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">li</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;a&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">link</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">attrs</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">link</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
                        <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="s2">&quot;page_number&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">page_num</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">})</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">nav_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># EPUB2 NCX format</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">page_target</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">page_list_nav</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findall</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.//{*}pageTarget&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">nav_label</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_target</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;{*}navLabel&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_target</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;{*}content&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">text_elem</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_label</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;{*}text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">nav_label</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text_elem</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">text_elem</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
                <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">content</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="s2">&quot;page_number&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">page_num</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="p">})</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Sort entries by document order and position</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;src&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_doc_key</span><span class="p">(</span>
