                <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order_decoded</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_position_robust</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">position</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">base_href</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">999999</span>
                <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

        <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_order&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)))</span>

        <span class="c1"># Extract text for each page (between page markers)</span>
        <span class="n">num_entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_build_chapter_position_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">num_entries</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">num_entries</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

            <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_extract_text_between_positions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Find which chapter this page belongs to</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_chapter_for_position</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">page</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">page_number</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;page_number&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">char_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">calculate_text_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">PageSource</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">EPUB_PAGE_LIST</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">pages</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pages</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_generate_synthetic_pages</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">page_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Generate synthetic pages from the EPUB content.</span>

<span class="sd">        Pages are split at sentence boundaries to avoid breaking sentences</span>
<span class="sd">        across pages.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            page_size: Size of pages in characters or words</span>
<span class="sd">            use_words: If True, page_size is word count; otherwise character count</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            List of synthetic Page objects</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">current_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>  <span class="c1"># Current size in chars or words</span>
        <span class="n">current_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">current_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_size</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Get size of text in chars or words.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">use_words</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">())</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">save_page</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">            </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Save current accumulated sentences as a page.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">nonlocal</span> <span class="n">page_num</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current_size</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Join sentences, preserving paragraph breaks</span>
                <span class="n">page_text_parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_text_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_text_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="c1"># Build page text with proper spacing</span>
                <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_text_parts</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">page_text_parts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">part</span>
                    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">part</span>

                <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

                <span class="n">pages</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">page_number</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_num</span><span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">char_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">calculate_text_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">PageSource</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">SYNTHETIC</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current_chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                <span class="n">current_sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
                <span class="n">current_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># If chapter changes and we have accumulated content, save</span>
            <span class="c1"># current page first</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">current_chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">current_chapter_id</span>
                    <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">current_chapter_title</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">save_page</span><span class="p">()</span>

            <span class="n">current_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
            <span class="n">current_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span>

            <span class="c1"># Split chapter into sentences</span>
            <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_split_into_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sentence</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Handle paragraph break markers</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sentence</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

                <span class="n">sentence</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

                <span class="n">sentence_size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">get_size</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="c1"># If single sentence exceeds page size, we have to include it anyway</span>
                <span class="c1"># (we don&#39;t split sentences)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sentence_size</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">page_size</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Single oversized sentence - create its own page</span>
                    <span class="n">pages</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">page_number</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_num</span><span class="p">),</span>
                            <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">char_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">calculate_text_length</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">),</span>
                            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">PageSource</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">SYNTHETIC</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">current_chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">page_num</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

                <span class="c1"># Check if adding this sentence would exceed page size</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_size</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sentence_size</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">page_size</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Save current page and start new one</span>
                    <span class="n">save_page</span><span class="p">()</span>

                <span class="c1"># Add sentence to current page</span>
                <span class="n">current_sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentence</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">current_size</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">sentence_size</span>

        <span class="c1"># Don&#39;t forget the last page</span>
        <span class="n">save_page</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pages</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_split_into_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Split text into sentences, preserving paragraph breaks.</span>

<span class="sd">        Handles common abbreviations and edge cases to avoid incorrect splits.</span>
<span class="sd">        Paragraph breaks (\\n\\n) are preserved within the sentence list.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            text: Text to split into sentences</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            List of sentences (may include empty strings representing paragraph breaks)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_sentences</span>

        <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">para_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="n">para_sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">apply_corrections</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">split_on_colon</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para_sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="c1"># Add paragraph break marker after each paragraph (except the last)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">para_idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># Paragraph break marker</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sentences</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_chapter_position_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Build a sorted list of chapter positions for lookup.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            List of (doc_href, position, chapter_id, chapter_title) tuples</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_positions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;internal:&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;#&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Try to find the document</span>
            <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">base_href</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;/&quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">key</span>
                    <span class="k">break</span>
                <span class="n">decoded</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">urllib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unquote</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">decoded</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">base_href</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">decoded</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;/&quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">base_href</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="n">doc_key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">key</span>
                    <span class="k">break</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_find_position_robust</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_positions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">doc_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">))</span>

        <span class="c1"># Sort by document order and position</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_positions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_order</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="mi">999999</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">x</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]))</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapter_positions</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_find_chapter_for_position</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Find which chapter a given position belongs to.</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Tuple of (chapter_id, chapter_title) or (None, None)</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">result_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">result_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ch_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ch_pos</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ch_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ch_title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ch_doc</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">ch_pos</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ch_id</span>
                <span class="n">result_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ch_title</span>
            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">ch_doc</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">ch_pos</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result_title</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_get_spine_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Get the index of a document in the spine, logging if missing.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">logger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warning</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Document &#39;</span><span class="si">%s</span><span class="s2">&#39; not found in spine order&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_slice_spine_html</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">next_pos</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">allow_wraparound</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Slice HTML across spine documents between two positions.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">current_doc_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_doc</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">:]</span>
            <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_spine_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">doc_idx</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)):</span>
                <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">doc_idx</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_doc</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">next_pos</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current_doc_html</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">:]</span>
        <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_spine_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">idx_next</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_spine_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">idx_next</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span>

        <span class="n">docs_between</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">idx_next</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">docs_between</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">idx_next</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">allow_wraparound</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">idx_next</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">docs_between</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx_current</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:]</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">idx_next</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">doc_href</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">docs_between</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">doc_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">next_doc_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">doc_content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">next_doc_html</span><span class="p">[:</span> <span class="n">next_pos</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_extract_text_between_positions</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract text between two page positions.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            current: Current page entry with doc_href and position</span>
<span class="sd">            next_entry: Next page entry, or None for last page</span>
<span class="sd">            spine_docs: List of document hrefs in spine order</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Extracted and cleaned text</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">current_doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">current_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">next_doc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;doc_href&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">next_pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;position&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_entry</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="n">slice_html</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_slice_spine_html</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">current_doc</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">current_pos</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">next_doc</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">next_pos</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">spine_docs</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">allow_wraparound</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">slice_html</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

        <span class="c1"># Parse and clean HTML</span>
        <span class="n">slice_soup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slice_html</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;html.parser&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tag</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;p&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;div&quot;</span><span class="p">]):</span>
            <span class="n">tag</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">paragraph_separator</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tag</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find_all</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s2">&quot;sup&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sub&quot;</span><span class="p">]):</span>
            <span class="n">tag</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decompose</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">clean_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">slice_soup</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_text</span><span class="p">(),</span>
            <span class="n">preserve_single_newlines</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">paragraph_separator</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.extract_pages">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.extract_pages">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_pages</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">page_numbers</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">deduplicate_chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">skip_toc</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Extract text from selected pages.</span>

<span class="sd">        :param page_numbers: List of page numbers to extract. If None, extract all.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param deduplicate_chapter_titles: If True, removes duplicate chapter titles</span>
<span class="sd">            that appear as the first line of page content. Default is True.</span>
<span class="sd">        :param skip_toc: If True, skip pages from TOC/Introduction chapter.</span>
<span class="sd">            Default is False.</span>
<span class="sd">        :returns: Combined text from all selected pages with chapter titles separated</span>
<span class="sd">            by 4 linebreaks before the title and 2 linebreaks after.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">pages</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_pages</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page_numbers</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pages</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">pages_by_number</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">page_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">page</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">page</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">pages_by_number</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">num</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">num</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">page_numbers</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">num</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pages_by_number</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Note: We don&#39;t filter out entire pages here anymore</span>
        <span class="c1"># Instead, we strip TOC content from pages below</span>

        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">current_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">page</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Strip TOC content from beginning of page if requested</span>
            <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">skip_toc</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Check if this is a front matter chapter by title</span>
                <span class="n">front_matter_keywords</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;INTRODUCTION&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;TABLE OF CONTENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;CONTENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;TOC&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;ACKNOWLEDGMENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;FOREWORD&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;PREFACE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">}</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span>
                    <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">front_matter_keywords</span>
                <span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Skip entire page if it&#39;s a known front matter chapter</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

                <span class="c1"># First check if this is a pure TOC page (no real content)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_is_toc_or_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Try to strip TOC and see if anything remains</span>
                    <span class="n">stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_strip_toc_from_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                        <span class="c1"># Pure TOC page with no content - skip it</span>
                        <span class="k">continue</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Has content after TOC - use stripped version</span>
                    <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stripped</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Not primarily a TOC page, but might have TOC at start</span>
                    <span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_strip_toc_from_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">)</span>

                <span class="c1"># Skip page if nothing remains after stripping</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Add chapter title when chapter changes</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">current_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">current_chapter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span>
                <span class="c1"># Add chapter title with proper formatting</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Not the first chapter: 4 linebreaks before title</span>
                    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n\n\n</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current_chapter</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># First chapter: no leading linebreaks</span>
                    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current_chapter</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># Apply title deduplication if requested</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">deduplicate_chapter_titles</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">cleaned_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_remove_duplicate_title_line</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">cleaned_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_text</span>

            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&lt;PAGE: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">page_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&gt;&gt;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">cleaned_text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span></div>


    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_is_toc_or_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Page</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Detect if a page is likely TOC or front matter content.</span>

<span class="sd">        Strategy:</span>
<span class="sd">        1. Check if chapter title is a known front matter keyword</span>
<span class="sd">        2. Check if page content contains many chapter titles (indicating TOC listing)</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            page: Page object to check</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            True if page appears to be TOC or front matter</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check if chapter title itself is front matter</span>
        <span class="n">front_matter_keywords</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;INTRODUCTION&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;TABLE OF CONTENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;CONTENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;TOC&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;ACKNOWLEDGMENTS&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;FOREWORD&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;PREFACE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">front_matter_keywords</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="n">search_terms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_upper_titles_for_toc</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">search_terms</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check if this page contains many of these terms (indicating it&#39;s a TOC)</span>
        <span class="n">text_upper</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="mi">2000</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">()</span>  <span class="c1"># Check first 2000 chars</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text_upper</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Count how many search terms appear as standalone lines</span>
        <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">line_stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_stripped</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">search_terms</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

        <span class="c1"># If more than 3 chapter/title names appear as lines, it&#39;s likely TOC</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_strip_toc_from_page</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Strip TOC chapter listing from the beginning of page text.</span>

<span class="sd">        This removes the table of contents (list of chapter names) but keeps</span>
<span class="sd">        other front matter like acknowledgements, dedications, etc.</span>

<span class="sd">        Args:</span>
<span class="sd">            page_text: The page text to process</span>

<span class="sd">        Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">            Text with TOC chapter listing removed</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">page_text</span>

        <span class="c1"># Build list of chapter titles to detect TOC</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_titles</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_get_upper_titles_for_toc</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">page_text</span>

        <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">page_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">toc_entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

        <span class="c1"># Find lines that are chapter titles (exact match or at start of line)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">line_stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="n">line_upper</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line_stripped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">()</span>

            <span class="c1"># Check if line is exactly a chapter title</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_upper</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_titles</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line_upper</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line_stripped</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">))</span>  <span class="c1"># True = exact match</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Check if line starts with a chapter title followed by other text</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_upper</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="c1"># Found chapter title at start of line</span>
                        <span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">line_stripped</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">))</span>  <span class="c1"># False = partial</span>
                        <span class="k">break</span>

        <span class="c1"># If we found 5+ chapter titles in sequence, it&#39;s the TOC chapter listing</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Check if they&#39;re consecutive (dense listing)</span>
            <span class="n">first_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">last_idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

            <span class="c1"># If entries are within 3 lines per entry on average, it&#39;s a TOC</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">last_idx</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">first_idx</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Handle the last entry specially if it&#39;s a partial match</span>
                <span class="n">last_entry_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">last_entry_line</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">is_exact</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">toc_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>

                <span class="c1"># Build result</span>
                <span class="n">before_toc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">first_idx</span><span class="p">]</span>

                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_exact</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Last entry is exact match - skip entire line</span>
                    <span class="n">after_toc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_entry_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:]</span>
                <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Last entry has content after chapter name - keep the remainder</span>
                    <span class="c1"># Find where the chapter title ends</span>
                    <span class="n">line_upper</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_entry_line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">()</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_titles</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line_upper</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
                            <span class="c1"># Remove the chapter title part, keep the rest</span>
                            <span class="n">remainder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">last_entry_line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()</span>
                            <span class="n">after_toc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">remainder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_entry_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:]</span>
                            <span class="k">break</span>
                    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">after_toc</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_entry_idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="p">:]</span>

                <span class="c1"># Combine, skipping leading empty lines</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">before_toc</span>
                <span class="n">started</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">after_toc</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">started</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="n">started</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>

                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">page_text</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.inspect_package">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.inspect_package">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">inspect_package</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EpubPackageInfo</span><span class="p">:</span>
