<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return read-only package, manifest, and spine metadata.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.package</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">inspect_package</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">inspect_package</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.get_spine_documents">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.get_spine_documents">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_spine_documents</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_byte_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_non_linear</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">SourceDocument</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return decoded source documents for spine items.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.package</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">get_spine_documents</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">get_spine_documents</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_byte_offsets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_byte_offsets</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_non_linear</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_non_linear</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.get_navigation">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.get_navigation">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">get_navigation</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">NavigationEntry</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return structured navigation entries.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.nav</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">navigation_from_parser</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">navigation_from_parser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_spine_documents</span><span class="p">())</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.extract_structured">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.extract_structured">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_structured</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ExtractionPolicy</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_raw_documents</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_offsets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_inline_runs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_segments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_markdown_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">markdown_flavor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;commonmark&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;gfm&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">segment_mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">StructuredEpubExtraction</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a structured, loss-aware EPUB extraction model.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.blocks</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">extract_blocks</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.diagnostics</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">StrictExtractionError</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.fragments</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">render_block_xhtml_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">render_segment_xhtml_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.markdown_fragments</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">render_block_markdown_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">render_segment_markdown_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.nav</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">navigation_from_parser</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.package</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">inspect_package</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.segments</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">extract_segments</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.source</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">sha256_bytes</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">.toc_map</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotate_blocks_with_navigation</span>

        <span class="n">extraction_policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">policy</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">ExtractionPolicy</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">markdown_flavor</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">extraction_policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">extraction_policy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">markdown_flavor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">markdown_flavor</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">documents</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_spine_documents</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">include_byte_offsets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_offsets</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_non_linear</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">extraction_policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_non_linear_spine</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">extraction_policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">navigation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">navigation_from_parser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">documents</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="n">diagnostics</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">document</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">documents</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">document_blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_blocks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">include_markdown_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">rendered_blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">document_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">render_block_xhtml_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span>
                            <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_markdown_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">markdown_fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">render_block_markdown_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span>
                            <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="n">rendered_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">document_blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rendered_blocks</span>
            <span class="n">blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document_blocks</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">document_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">annotate_blocks_with_navigation</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_segments</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment_mode</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_segments</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_segments</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">include_markdown_fragments</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">blocks_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="n">rendered_segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">blocks_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">]</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">render_segment_xhtml_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_markdown_fragments</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">markdown_fragment</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">render_segment_markdown_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">rendered_segments</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rendered_segments</span>
        <span class="n">package</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">inspect_package</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">package</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">markdown_fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">markdown_fragment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">xhtml_fragment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">markdown_fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">markdown_fragment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">extraction_policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strict_offsets</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">d</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;warning&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">d</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">diagnostics</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">StrictExtractionError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">StructuredEpubExtraction</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">filepath</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">sha256_bytes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">filepath</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_bytes</span><span class="p">()),</span>
            <span class="n">package</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">package</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">documents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">documents</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">blocks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">segments</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">diagnostics</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EPUBParser.extract_segments">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.EPUBParser.extract_segments">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_segments</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ExtractionPolicy</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TextSegment</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return structured text segments for the EPUB.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_structured</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">include_segments</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment_mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span>
        <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">segments</span></div>
</div>

</pre></div>
